title: mentha × villosa f. pascuicola
intro: Mentha × villosa f. pascuicola, also known as Pineapple Mint or Pineapple Peppermint, is a unique variety of mint plant that is characterized by its distinctive pineapple-like fragrance and flavor. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate nausea. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa f. pascuicola include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support oral health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
